title: SiTime Corporation Q3 2020 Earnings Results and Performance
text: SiTime Corporation reported Q3 2020 earnings of $0.16 per share, beating the estimate of $0.068 per share. This represented strong performance in the third quarter with the earnings call held on November 4, 2020. The company delivered solid results despite market challenges. Revenue and earnings performance exceeded analyst expectations, demonstrating the company's strong execution and market position.
